推荐场景: 家庭餐桌｜听懂家人关系
60秒任务: 「家人关系」：介绍/寒暄/邀请；A=礼貌短句/正确动作；B=表达生硬/动作错翻车。
目标功能: 关系介绍｜寒暄｜喜好｜邀请｜接受/拒绝初步
场景族: 朋友聚会｜家庭客厅｜餐桌｜派对｜聊天场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
This is my family.（介绍家庭）
This is my mother.（介绍母亲）
This is my father.（介绍父亲）
This is my sister.（介绍姐妹）
This is my brother.（介绍兄弟）
Who is this?（询问是谁）
Is this your mother?（确认关系）
Yes, this is my mother.（确认）
No, this is my aunt.（纠正）
How many people are in your family?（询问家庭人数）
There are ___ people.（说明人数）
I have one sister.（说明家人）
I have one brother.（说明家人）
Nice to meet your family.（礼貌回应）
They are at home.（说明地点）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: family, mother, father, sister, brother, parent, son, daughter, wife, husband, aunt, uncle
Verbs: have, meet, live, know
Numbers: one, two, three, four, five
Place: at home, in my family
Chunks: this is my ___, who is this, one sister, one brother, ___ people
